description: Canonical map of all NEXO Brain MCP tools with enforcement rules. Read by NEXO Desktop and nexo-session-guard to mechanically enforce protocol compliance.

enforcement_types.on_session_start: Must be called at the beginning of a session, within the first N tool calls
enforcement_types.on_session_end: Must be called before closing a session or chat
enforcement_types.periodic_by_messages: Must be called every N user messages if not called voluntarily
enforcement_types.periodic_by_time: Must be called every N minutes of active session if not called voluntarily
enforcement_types.before_tool: Must be called before any of the listed watch_tools are used
enforcement_types.after_tool: Must be called after any of the listed watch_tools are used
enforcement_types.on_event: Must be called when a specific event is detected

nexo_startup.description: Register new session, clean stale ones, return active sessions + alerts

enforcement.inject_prompt: Execute nexo_startup now. Do not produce any visible text, just run the tool.

nexo_heartbeat.description: Update session task, check inbox and pending questions. Auto-detects trust events

enforcement.inject_prompt: Execute nexo_heartbeat with the current session SID and a brief description of what you are doing. Do not produce any visible text.

nexo_stop.description: Cleanly close a session. Removes it from active sessions immediately

enforcement.inject_prompt: Execute nexo_stop with the current session SID. Do not produce any visible text.

nexo_smart_startup.description: Pre-load relevant cognitive memories based on pending followups, due reminders, and last session topics

enforcement.inject_prompt: Execute nexo_smart_startup to pre-load relevant context. Do not produce any visible text.

nexo_session_diary_read.description: Read recent session diaries for context continuity

enforcement.inject_prompt: Execute nexo_session_diary_read with last_day=true and brief=true to load context from previous sessions. Do not produce any visible text.

nexo_session_diary_write.description: Write end-of-session diary with decisions, discards, and context for next session

enforcement.inject_prompt: It has been 15 minutes of active session without writing a diary. Execute nexo_session_diary_write with a summary of what you have done so far. Do not produce any visible text.
This session is ending. Execute nexo_session_diary_write with a complete summary of decisions, pending items, and context for the next session. Do not produce any visible text.
Execute nexo_reminders with filter='due' and then with filter='followups'. Do not produce any visible text.

nexo_task_open.description: Open a non-trivial task with heartbeat, guard, rules, and Cortex captured as one protocol contract

enforcement.inject_prompt: You have made 10+ tool calls without opening a protocol task. Execute nexo_task_open for the current work. Do not produce any visible text.

nexo_task_close.description: Close a protocol task with evidence

enforcement.inject_prompt: You claimed work is done but have not closed the protocol task. Execute nexo_task_close with evidence of completion. Do not produce any visible text.

nexo_task_acknowledge_guard.description: Acknowledge blocking guard rules on an open protocol task before proceeding

nexo_guard_check.description: Check learnings relevant to files/area BEFORE editing code

enforcement.inject_prompt: You are about to edit files without running guard_check first. Execute nexo_guard_check for the files you are about to modify. Do not produce any visible text.

nexo_guard_file_check.description: Pre-edit check: surfaces learnings and recent changes for files about to be modified

nexo_guard_cross_check.description: Cross-check audit findings against known learnings to filter false positives

nexo_guard_log_repetition.description: Log a learning repetition (new learning matches existing one)

nexo_guard_stats.description: Get guard system statistics: repetition rate, trends, top problem areas

nexo_track.description: Track files being edited. Detects conflicts with other sessions

enforcement.inject_prompt: You are editing shared files without tracking them. Execute nexo_track for the files you are modifying. Do not produce any visible text.

nexo_untrack.description: Stop tracking files. If no paths given, releases all

nexo_files.description: Show all tracked files across all active sessions with conflict detection

nexo_learning_add.description: Add a new learning (resolved error, pattern, gotcha)

enforcement.inject_prompt: The user just corrected you but no learning was captured. Execute nexo_learning_add to record this correction as a reusable learning. Do not produce any visible text.

nexo_learning_list.description: List all learnings, grouped by category

nexo_learning_quality.description: Score learning quality so fragile rules can be strengthened

nexo_learning_apply_retroactively.description: Scan recent decisions and surface those that conflict with a learning's prevention rule

nexo_checkpoint_save.description: Save a session checkpoint for auto-compaction continuity

enforcement.inject_prompt: Context compaction is imminent. Execute nexo_checkpoint_save to preserve session state. Do not produce any visible text.
Context was just compacted. Execute nexo_checkpoint_read to restore session state. Do not produce any visible text.

nexo_skill_match.description: Find skills matching a task description

enforcement.inject_prompt: A multi-step task was detected. Execute nexo_skill_match to check for reusable procedures. Do not produce any visible text.

nexo_confidence_check.description: Decide whether a non-trivial answer should be answered, verified, asked, or deferred

enforcement.inject_prompt: You are about to give an important factual answer. Execute nexo_confidence_check first. Do not produce any visible text.

nexo_menu.description: Generate the NEXO operations center menu

nexo_tool_explain.description: Explain a live NEXO tool/capability from the generated system catalog

nexo_doctor.description: Unified diagnostic report for boot/runtime/deep health

nexo_update.description: Pull latest NEXO code, backup DBs, run migrations, verify

nexo_reindex.description: Force full rebuild of the FTS5 search index

nexo_index_add_dir.description: Register a new directory for FTS5 search indexing

nexo_index_remove_dir.description: Remove a directory from FTS5 indexing

nexo_index_dirs.description: List all directories being indexed by FTS5

nexo_context_packet.description: Build a context packet for subagent injection

nexo_recent_context.description: Read recent hot context and continuity events

nexo_pre_action_context.description: Build the 24h recent-context bundle that should be reviewed before acting

nexo_session_portable_context.description: Build a portable handoff packet for another client/runtime

nexo_session_export_bundle.description: Export a machine-readable session bundle for cross-client handoff

nexo_transcript_recent.description: List recent Claude Code / Codex transcripts visible to NEXO

nexo_transcript_read.description: Read a full transcript by session id or path

nexo_send.description: Send a fire-and-forget message to another session or broadcast

nexo_ask.description: Ask a question to another session

nexo_answer.description: Answer a pending question from another session

nexo_check_answer.description: Check if a question has been answered

nexo_reminder_create.description: Create a new reminder for the user

nexo_reminder_get.description: Read a reminder with its history

nexo_reminder_update.description: Update fields of an existing reminder

nexo_reminder_note.description: Append a note to reminder history

nexo_followup_create.description: Create a new NEXO followup (autonomous task)

nexo_followup_get.description: Read a followup with its history

nexo_followup_update.description: Update fields of an existing followup

nexo_followup_note.description: Append a note to followup history

nexo_hook_runs.description: List recent hook lifecycle runs and per-hook health summary

nexo_credential_get.description: Get credential value(s) for a service

nexo_credential_update.description: Update a credential's value and/or notes

nexo_credential_list.description: List credentials (names and notes only, no values)

nexo_task_log.description: Record that an operational task was executed

nexo_task_list.description: Show execution history for operational tasks

nexo_task_frequency.description: Check which operational tasks are overdue based on their frequency

nexo_plugin_list.description: List all loaded plugins and their tools

nexo_plugin_remove.description: Unregister a plugin's tools from MCP

nexo_drive_reinforce.description: Reinforce a drive signal with a new observation

nexo_drive_act.description: Mark a drive signal as investigated with an outcome

nexo_cognitive_inspect.description: Inspect a specific memory by ID (debug)

nexo_cognitive_metrics.description: Performance metrics: retrieval relevance, repeat error rate

nexo_cognitive_dissonance.description: Detect conflicts between a new instruction and established LTM memories

nexo_cognitive_sentiment.description: Detect user's sentiment and get tone guidance

nexo_cognitive_pin.description: Pin a memory — never decays, boosted in search results

nexo_cognitive_snooze.description: Snooze a memory — hidden from searches until a date

nexo_cognitive_archive.description: Archive a memory — excluded from searches, can be restored

nexo_cognitive_restore.description: Restore a memory to active state

nexo_cognitive_quarantine_list.description: List quarantine queue items awaiting promotion to STM

nexo_cognitive_quarantine_promote.description: Manually promote a quarantine item to STM

nexo_cognitive_trigger_preview.description: Preview anticipatory trigger matches without firing

nexo_cognitive_trigger_delete.description: Delete a prospective trigger by ID

nexo_cognitive_trigger_rearm.description: Re-arm a fired trigger so it can fire again

nexo_cortex_decide.description: Evaluate 2+ alternatives for a high-impact task

nexo_cortex_quality.description: Summarise recommendation accept rate, override rate

nexo_decision_log.description: Log a non-trivial decision with reasoning, alternatives, and evidence

nexo_decision_outcome.description: Record what actually happened after a past decision

nexo_remember.description: High-level memory write: store one durable memory item

nexo_memory_recall.description: High-level memory lookup wrapper around nexo_recall

nexo_memory_export.description: Export a readable markdown snapshot of key NEXO memory layers

nexo_memory_backend_status.description: Show the active memory backend contract and registered backend list

nexo_memory_review_queue.description: Show decisions and learnings that are due for review

nexo_diary_archive_read.description: Read a single archived diary entry in full detail

nexo_diary_archive_search.description: Search the permanent diary archive (subconscious memory)

nexo_entity_create.description: Create a new entity (person, service, URL)

nexo_entity_list.description: List all entities grouped by type

nexo_entity_search.description: Search entities by name, value, or type

nexo_claim_add.description: Add a structured claim with provenance, evidence, and freshness

nexo_claim_get.description: Get a single claim with its links and freshness metadata

nexo_claim_lint.description: Audit stale, weak, contradictory, or evidence-poor claims

nexo_claim_search.description: Search claims by meaning or filters

nexo_claim_stats.description: Claim graph statistics and attention counts

nexo_claim_verify.description: Verify or reclassify a claim state

nexo_kg_query.description: Query knowledge graph — traverse from a node

nexo_kg_neighbors.description: Get direct neighbors of a node

nexo_kg_path.description: Find shortest path between two nodes

nexo_kg_export.description: Export the bitemporal KG to JSON-LD or GraphML

nexo_media_memory_add.description: Store a non-text artifact as first-class media memory metadata

nexo_media_memory_search.description: Search media memories by text, type, tag, or domain

nexo_media_memory_stats.description: Stats for the multimodal/media memory layer

nexo_skill_apply.description: Apply a skill in guide, execute, or hybrid mode

nexo_skill_approve.description: Approve a local/remote executable skill so it can run

nexo_skill_compose.description: Compose multiple existing skills into one higher-level reusable skill

nexo_skill_compose_candidates.description: Voyager-style detection: list skill pairs that fired together frequently

nexo_skill_create.description: Create a new skill with guide/execute/hybrid metadata

nexo_skill_evolution_candidates.description: Return candidates for skill improvement or text-to-script evolution

nexo_skill_featured.description: Return featured published/stable skills for startup discovery

nexo_skill_list.description: List skills, optionally filtered by level, tag, or source

nexo_skill_merge.description: Merge two similar skills into one

nexo_skill_outcome_review.description: Review whether a skill should be promoted, deprioritized, or retired

nexo_skill_promote.description: Promote a skill to a stronger published/stable lifecycle stage

nexo_skill_result.description: Record the result of using a skill

nexo_skill_retire.description: Retire a skill cleanly so it leaves the active lifecycle

nexo_skill_seed_from_outcome_pattern.description: Materialize a draft skill candidate from a repeated successful outcome pattern

nexo_skill_sync.description: Sync filesystem skill definitions into SQLite

nexo_skill_test.description: Test a skill through the canonical runtime in dry-run mode

nexo_adaptive_mode.description: Get or compute adaptive personality mode (FLOW/NORMAL/TENSION)

nexo_adaptive_history.description: View recent adaptive mode transitions and signal history

nexo_adaptive_reset.description: Reset adaptive state for new session

nexo_adaptive_weights.description: View adaptive weights — static vs learned, training stats

nexo_artifact_create.description: Register a new artifact (service, dashboard, script, API, etc)

nexo_artifact_delete.description: Delete an artifact from the registry

nexo_artifact_find.description: Find artifacts using the retrieval ladder

nexo_artifact_learn_alias.description: Learn a new alias from user language

nexo_auto_flush_recent.description: Show recent structured auto-flush records written before compaction

nexo_backup_list.description: List available backups with dates and sizes

nexo_backup_now.description: Create an immediate backup of the NEXO database

nexo_change_commit.description: Link a change log entry to its git commit hash

nexo_change_log.description: Log a code/config change with full context

nexo_rules_check.description: Get applicable core rules for an area before acting

nexo_rules_list.description: List all core rules with status, grouped by category

nexo_rules_migrate.description: Sync rules from JSON definition to database

nexo_evolution_approve.description: Approve a pending Evolution proposal (user only)

nexo_evolution_history.description: Show past evolution cycles, proposals, and their outcomes

nexo_evolution_propose.description: Manually trigger an evolution analysis outside weekly schedule

nexo_evolution_reject.description: Reject a pending Evolution proposal with reason

nexo_goal_open.description: Open a durable goal so multi-session objectives stay explicit

nexo_goal_get.description: Read a durable goal and optionally include linked workflow runs

nexo_goal_update.description: Update a durable goal with state and next action

nexo_goal_profile_get.description: Get or resolve the active Goal Engine profile for a context

nexo_goal_profile_list.description: List Goal Engine profiles currently available

nexo_goal_profile_set.description: Create or update a Goal Engine profile

nexo_impact_score.description: Compute and persist Impact Scoring for a followup

nexo_outcome_register.description: Register an expected action outcome with metric source and deadline

nexo_outcome_check.description: Check a tracked outcome now using linked state or supplied evidence

nexo_outcome_list.description: List tracked outcomes filtered by status and/or action type

nexo_outcome_cancel.description: Cancel an outcome so it stops blocking reviews

nexo_outcome_pattern_candidates.description: List repeated resolved outcome patterns consistent enough to become reusable knowledge

nexo_outcome_pattern_capture.description: Capture one repeated outcome pattern as a reusable artifact

nexo_personal_plugin_create.description: Create a persistent personal MCP plugin scaffold

nexo_personal_script_create.description: Create a new personal script, register it, and optionally schedule it

nexo_personal_script_remove.description: Remove a personal script from the registry

nexo_personal_script_unschedule.description: Remove all personal schedules attached to a script

nexo_personal_scripts_classify.description: Classify files in NEXO_HOME/scripts into personal, core, ignored

nexo_personal_scripts_ensure_schedules.description: Create or repair personal script schedules declared in inline metadata

nexo_personal_scripts_list.description: List personal scripts known to NEXO

nexo_personal_scripts_reconcile.description: Classify, sync, and ensure declared personal schedules

nexo_personal_scripts_sync.description: Sync personal scripts and personal cron schedules from filesystem

nexo_preference_list.description: List all preferences grouped by category

nexo_schedule_add.description: Add a new personal cron job

nexo_schedule_status.description: Show cron execution status: what ran overnight, what failed

nexo_somatic_check.description: View somatic risk scores for files/areas — pain memory

nexo_state_watcher_create.description: Create a persistent state watcher for drift detection

nexo_state_watcher_run.description: Run persistent state watchers and return health summary

nexo_state_watcher_update.description: Update an existing persistent state watcher

nexo_user_state.description: Compute user-state snapshot from trust, corrections, sentiment

nexo_workflow_open.description: Open a durable workflow run for long multi-step or cross-session work

nexo_workflow_update.description: Update a workflow run with replayable checkpoints

nexo_workflow_get.description: Read the full durable workflow state

nexo_workflow_resume.description: Summarize the next actionable step for a workflow run

nexo_workflow_replay.description: Replay the latest checkpoints of a workflow run

nexo_workflow_handoff.description: Record a durable handoff so another agent or client can resume

nexo_workflow_compensation.description: Show the rollback / compensation plan for a partially completed workflow

nexo_run_workflow.description: High-level durable workflow entry point for the public API surface
